newTests.name:

   clojure.set, clojure.walk, zprint, ns-aliases, and cdp-connect. > Math and java.math classes > Math/PI and Math/E resolve as static fields

   clojure.set, clojure.walk, zprint, ns-aliases, and cdp-connect. > Math and java.math classes > BigDecimal and BigInteger work via bare import

Tests for newly exposed SCI functions: WSL detection, java->clj,
